title: Inner Support Elevation Optimization
summary: Use PLAXIS 3D to compare five inner support elevations for a staged pit-in-pit excavation and report settlement and lateral displacement outcomes with the required engineering deliverables.
taskPrompt:
You are a geotechnical engineer using PLAXIS 3D 2023.2 on Windows.

## Your Task
Evaluate how the inner support elevation changes settlement and lateral wall movement for the staged A-zone pit-in-pit excavation benchmark.

## Input Files
- Benchmark model specification: `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\input\benchmark_model_spec_en.md`
- Engineering assumptions: `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\input\engineering_assumptions_en.md`
- Structural materials reference: `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\input\A_zone_structural_materials_en.md`
- Task-specific brief and formulas: `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\input\task_specific_brief_en.md`
- Figure index: `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\input\figure_index_en.md`
- Answer template: `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\input\answer_template.json`
- Reference figures:
  - `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\input\figure_2_1_project_site_plan.png`
  - `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\input\figure_2_3_excavation_zone_plan.png`
  - `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\input\figure_2_4_2_5_support_layout_and_section.png`
  - `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\input\figure_2_6_monitoring_layout.png`
  - `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\input\figure_3_1_plaxis_model_geometry.png`
  - `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\input\figure_3_2_mesh_layout.png`

## Software
- Launch PLAXIS 3D Input from: `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\software\launch_plaxis_3d_input.bat`
- Launch PLAXIS 3D Output from: `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\software\launch_plaxis_3d_output.bat`
- Launch PLAXIS 3D Output Viewer from: `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\software\launch_plaxis_3d_output_viewer.bat`

## What You Must Do
1. Review the staged benchmark specification, assumptions, figures, and answer template.
2. Build or duplicate the PLAXIS 3D case family for the tested support elevations `0 m`, `1 m`, `2 m`, `3 m`, and `4 m`.
3. Run the staged calculations through the final excavation state for each case.
4. Extract maximum settlement and maximum outer-wall lateral displacement for each case.
5. Save one or more native PLAXIS project files using the filename prefix:
   `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\output\model_family_support_position`
6. Save the structured summary table exactly to:
   `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\output\case_summary.csv`
7. Save the required images exactly to:
   `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\output\pos_0m_output_view.png`
   `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\output\pos_2m_output_view.png`
   `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\output\pos_4m_output_view.png`
   `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\output\settlement_vs_support_position.png`
   `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\output\lateral_disp_vs_support_position.png`
8. Save the engineering memo exactly to:
   `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\output\support_position_engineering_memo.md`
9. Save the final machine-readable answer exactly to:
   `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\output\answer.json`

## Output Requirements
- `answer.json` must use the exact schema from `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\input\answer_template.json`
- Report settlement and displacement as positive magnitudes in millimeters
- Keep all work products inside `E:\agenthle\engineering\inner_support_elevation_optimization\base\output`
- Do not modify files under `input/`, `reference/`, `output_test_pos/`, or `output_test_neg/`
agentMustDo: Review the staged benchmark specification, engineering assumptions, figures, and answer template.
Build or duplicate the five PLAXIS 3D support-elevation cases for `0 m`, `1 m`, `2 m`, `3 m`, and `4 m`.
Run the calculations through the final excavation state and extract maximum settlement plus maximum outer-wall lateral displacement for each case.
Write the required PLAXIS project files, `case_summary.csv`, screenshots/plots, engineering memo, and final `answer.json` into `output/`.

inputFiles.name: benchmark_model_spec_en.md
inputFiles.description: Full staged excavation benchmark specification for the A-zone pit-in-pit model.

inputFiles.name: engineering_assumptions_en.md
inputFiles.description: Modeling assumptions and interpretation rules for the PLAXIS study.

inputFiles.name: A_zone_structural_materials_en.md
inputFiles.description: Structural and material properties required to rebuild the case family.

inputFiles.name: task_specific_brief_en.md
inputFiles.description: Task-specific formulas, reporting instructions, and expected engineering outputs.

inputFiles.name: figure_index_en.md
inputFiles.description: Index of the staged reference figures used to reconstruct the model and reporting views.

inputFiles.name: answer_template.json
inputFiles.description: Exact machine-readable output schema the agent must fill in.

referenceFiles.name: answer.json
referenceFiles.description: Final structured engineering answer covering all five support positions plus the best-position selections.

referenceFiles.name: case_summary.csv
referenceFiles.description: Per-case table containing support position, maximum settlement, and maximum lateral displacement.

referenceFiles.name: support_position_engineering_memo.md
referenceFiles.description: Short engineering memo that explains the observed support-elevation tradeoffs.

referenceFiles.name: model_family_support_position*
referenceFiles.description: One or more native PLAXIS project files saved with the required filename prefix.

evaluation:
- Hard-fail conditions: missing `answer.json`, invalid answer schema, missing required named artifacts, or missing PLAXIS project files with the required prefix.
- Base rubric: schema validity, evidence-file presence and naming, project-save presence, screenshot/plot presence, CSV parseability, and memo presence contribute the first half of the score.
- Numeric rubric: 14 answer fields are compared against hidden engineering ground truth.
- Tolerances: settlement/displacement fields use `max(0.30 mm, 5% relative error)`; percentage fields use `max(0.30 percentage points, 8% relative error)`; best-position fields must match exactly.
- Expected positive fixture score: `1.0`.
- Expected realistic negative fixture score: below `1.0`; the committed negative fixture scores `0.5` because it preserves the artifact set while failing the numeric engineering checks.

classifier.rationale: The task involves geotechnical engineering and excavation analysis.
